subject: [CDS-SDC-DIST] Move CDS listener to use strimzi kafka user template
commit_message:
[CDS-SDC-DIST] Move CDS listener to use strimzi kafka user template

Move CDS SDC listener to use Strizi Kafka user template

Change-Id: I84c0a5840b8ce264e0be5ddcfc33c96b2facef60
Signed-off-by: david.mcweeney <david.mcweeney@est.tech>
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1851

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6361/ )

Hi,
looking into the cds-sdc-listener logs I see some failures:

2023-02-27 10:07:11,693|||pool-4-thread-4||||INFO||||||| Trying to write CSAR artifact to file  with URL /sdc/v1/catalog/services/DemoPnfBeotw9sb7w3qsbzxlwy8/1.0/artifacts/service-DemoPnfBeotw9sb7w3qsbzxlwy8-csar.csar and UUID e349b262-9e5e-44b1-91e9-eb6233564eec

2023-02-27 10:07:11,693|||pool-4-thread-4||||ERROR||||||| Fail to write the data into FileOutputStream /opt/app/onap/sdc-listener/csar-archive, {}
java.io.FileNotFoundException: /opt/app/onap/sdc-listener/csar-archive (Is a directory)

	at java.base/java.io.FileOutputStream.open(Unknown Source)
	at java.base/java.io.FileOutputStream.(Unknown Source)
	at java.base/java.io.FileOutputStream.(Unknown Source)

Is this an issue ?
